docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY PANDEYA, ASHISH AS TO DEFENDANT GURUNG, NIROJ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED.(506)
